rationale: Revised per user direction (2026-06-10): the per-platform SDKs tab is REJECTED. Parity across platforms is the product goal, so the docs present ONE surface per feature using the language-tab model; platform specifics — including 'not yet supported / coming soon' status — are strictly quarantined inside that platform's tab and never leak into the general prose, which stays platform-agnostic (one reference language for examples). The per-SDK treatment survives only in 'SDK setup': short install/init/troubleshooting pages per platform, which were the worst tab-bloat offenders. The orthogonal fixes from the diagnosis are retained in full: single-source-of-truth reference pages (ShortKitPlayer, FeedConfig/FeedFilter, content model) that guides link to instead of duplicating; oversized pages split along feature boundaries (overlays -> video overlays / item overlays / 2 recipes; player-and-widget -> player / widgets); snippets/versions.mdx kills the 12 hardcoded version strings; a parity matrix page (setup/platform-support) is the one sanctioned out-of-tab home for availability status; Changelog + migrations tab gives PR #20-style content a home; API Reference is unchanged structurally and gains ~36 missing endpoint pages. Architectural divergences that cannot be expressed as 'same feature, different syntax' are flagged to the user as candidate PRODUCT parity work rather than accommodated structurally. Tab-label standardization (iOS / Android / Flutter / React Native / Web) and the empty-tab rule ('a tab either shows real shipped API or an explicit not-yet-supported note — never invented content') become enforced guidelines for the automated docs pipeline.

pagePlan.detail: Slim install duplication to links into setup/{platform}; versions via snippets/versions.mdx; language tabs kept.
-> setup/{ios,android,flutter,react-native,web} short per-SDK pages + setup/platform-support. Init signatures corrected. Redirects added.
Type matrix/field tables -> concepts/content-model (platform-agnostic); custom-feed input -> display/custom-feeds; fallback/lifecycle -> concepts/feeds.
-> content/upload-videos, content/carousels, content/captions-and-metadata, content/webhooks. Duplicated field tables/callback events become links; internal 'known API quirk' admission removed.
Server lifecycle/broadcast/clips -> content/live-streams (corrected lifecycle, webrtc token flow); client viewing surface -> customize/live (tabbed).
-> display/feed (embed/lifecycle) + display/feed-control (programmatic control, preload, multi-surface) + custom-feed parts to display/custom-feeds. Tabs kept; missing frontmatter fixed.
Init -> setup/{platform}; FeedConfig/FeedFilter -> reference/feed-config (canonical, corrected OR semantics); language section deleted.
-> reference/player, the sole canonical ShortKitPlayer reference (tabs, per-tab native units, phantom feedReady removed).
-> display/player + display/widgets. Fabricated Kotlin widget tabs replaced by real API or explicit not-yet-supported notes. Naming collision with sdk/player resolved.

-> customize/overlays (video), customize/item-overlays (carousel/survey/ad + NativeAdContent), customize/recipes-scrubber, customize/recipes-captions. Embedded player/ContentItem tables become links. RN tab rewritten to its real props/commands model.
-> customize/carousel-control: tabs kept; Android tab written fresh (shipped, undocumented); Flutter tab status per parity matrix.
-> concepts/identity, canonical; analytics recaps become links.
-> analytics/overview + analytics/custom-data (canonical signals home); identity recap deleted.
Orphan. Roadmap signal -> Changelog tab; parity truth -> setup/platform-support matrix; per-feature status -> in-tab notes.

pk/sk endpoint table materially wrong: remove phantom GET /v1/content{,/{id}}, /v1/analytics/*, POST /v1/org/rotate-secret-key; list real pk endpoints (events, identity/resolve, captions, live tokens, feed).
Stays canonical content field source; feed-item-shape notes replaced with link to new api/feed/object.
Keep endpoint docs; callback events/retry section replaced with link to api/webhooks; caption/carousel params cross-link new sub-resource pages.
Document shipped list filters (currently 'coming soon' lie).
Confirm PATCH merge semantics match content/captions-and-metadata guide; cross-link.
Correct lifecycle claim — streams can reactivate after idle; republish guidance.
Callback docs link api/webhooks instead of inlining.

apiAugmentations: New Feed group: api/feed/object — the feed item object (currently only hinted at in api/content/object and api/ad-config/object notes)
New Client runtime group (pk key): POST /v1/events
New Client runtime group: POST /v1/live-streams/{id}/viewer-token (required for documented webrtc protocol)
Content group: carousel images upload endpoint
Content group: carousel image order endpoint
Analytics & Events group (flat, appended — no structural regroup): GET /v1/metrics/{metric}/breakdown
Analytics & Events group: document filters[] param on existing get-metric, get-timeseries, list-events pages
Overview group: new api/webhooks page — canonical callback events + retry semantics (dedupes upload/import/clip)
Fix api/authentication pk/sk table: remove phantom GET /v1/content{,/{id}}, /v1/analytics/*, POST /v1/org/rotate-secret-key
contentWorkItems: Create snippets/versions.mdx with one entry per SDK version line (iOS/Android/RN/Flutter at 0.2.55, Web at 0.5.0); replace all 12 hardcoded version strings; wire release scripts to bump it
Correct FeedFilter.metadata to Map<String,[String]> with OR semantics across iOS/Android/RN/Web/API pages; mark Flutter pending 0.3.0 with Unreleased badge

Delete phantom APIs during splits: FeedOverlay.resetPlaybackProgress (iOS/Android), feedReady publisher, RN surveyMode/FeedItem/SurveyItem/AdSlot/ContentItem.isLive, Flutter SurveyMode/VTTCue, Web player.setItem/widget.setItems/scrollAxis, fabricated Kotlin player-and-widget tabs
Replace shipped-feature 'Coming soon' stubs with real docs: Flutter ShortKitPlayer/ShortKitWidget, Flutter carousel overlays, content list filters, client-upload guide, six RN widget props
Correct live-stream lifecycle claims (reactivation after idle re-publishes); add webrtc viewer-token flow to content/live-streams
Add missing description frontmatter (sdk/feed) and remove the 'known API quirk we plan to reconcile' internal admission from upload-pipeline content during migration

Add full redirects block to docs.json for every moved/split URL; rewrite doc_guidelines.md nav section, code-example rules (SDK tabs rule replaced by per-platform-page rule), and edit-vs-create rules to the five mechanical placement rules in lockstep
Vendor-name hygiene check on all newly written RN/Web/live content (streaming vendor, image-library names from source comments must not propagate)
Standardize tab labels everywhere: iOS / Android / Flutter / React Native / Web (kill 'Swift', 'iOS (UIKit)' variants; UIKit/SwiftUI become sub-variants inside the iOS tab)
Enforce the empty-tab rule: every platform tab shows real shipped API or an explicit 'Not yet supported on {platform}' note — never analogized content; encode in doc_guidelines.md
Fix init signatures in new setup/{platform} pages: iOS/Android drop phantom config:/feedItems: params, Android adds required context + correct package, RN moves config prop to <ShortKitFeed>
Update doc_guidelines.md in lockstep: new nav, edit-vs-create placement rules, tab-label + empty-tab + parity-matrix conventions; add full redirects block to docs.json
openQuestions: Architectural divergences flagged for product-parity decisions (see chat): RN overlay model, Web widget self-fetch, Android ms vs iOS seconds, RN prop naming, Flutter overlay engine model.
Ship big-bang or phased (setup + reference extraction first, guide reshuffle second)? Every Docs-tab URL moves either way (redirects included).
Analytics & Events API group stays flat at 15 pages — acceptable, or allow nested subgroups?
Web SDK absent from VERSIONS.md/release tooling — who owns its snippets/versions.mdx entry?
Exact router paths for live-token and carousel/finalize/create-shell endpoints verified against source during execution.
